latin: Itaque utcumque coepi tormentis uti. senex in taberna sedebat et narrabat. hostes intraverant, et ille — sine mora — tormentis uti coepit.

questions.prompt: What did the old man start doing when intruders came?
Where was the old man telling his story?

translation: So anyway, I started blasting. The old man was sitting in the bar narrating. Intruders had entered, and he — without delay — started blasting.
